16154 "[i:year:2012]"
16155 "recap"
16156 "The start of my photography. I had an Olympus XZ-1 and a bridge camera; both of which I loved and neither of which were really great cameras. I didn't take many pictures this year; a few cliche waterfall-but-slow-shutter pictures not fit for upload."
16154 16155 16156
16157 "[i:year:2013]"
16158 "I started to capture pictures of the interesting places I visited. It's also the first year I took a passable photo."
16157 16155 16158
16159 "[i:year:2015]"
16159 16155 31
16160 "[i:year:2016]"
16161 "A big year for me. I started travelling; while sitting in a cafe in Amsterdam a pride parade passed by. Not long afterwards I came out as transgender. I also started taking wildlife photos, a niche I've preferred since then."
16160 16155 16161
16162 "[i:year:2017]"
16163 "Lots of travel, especially around Ireland."
16162 16155 16163
16164 "[i:year:2018]"
16165 "In 2018 I left Europe for the first time, though I have to admit I find America is much pleasant (visually) outside its major cities."
16164 16155 16165
16166 "[i:year:2019]"
16167 "I was indoors for most of 2019, as was everyone else."
16166 16155 16167
16168 "[i:year:2020]"
16169 "Another pandemic year. I did get outside, occassionally, to take some wildlife photos."
16168 16155 16169
16170 "[i:year:2021]"
16171 "I re-visited America, to the mid-west. Chicago was monumental; as someone used to smaller European cities the _extent_ of the city was jaw-dropping. Despite my pre-conceptions, the biodiversity in the US is impressive; birds of prey, sandhill cranes, hummingbirds and woodpeckers were common. Wildlife was more present than in the parts of Europe i was used to."
16170 16155 16171
16172 "[i:year:2022]"
16173 "A big year for travel. I visited London (possibly my favourite city, it's impossible to be bored there), and saw more the rural parts of Wisconsin. The visit to the International Crane Foundation was a highlight; they're really charming birds"
16172 16155 16173
16174 "[i:year:2023]"
16175 "Berlin was a ghost-town when I visited, in the best way. The city was snowed under; I missed virtually every noteworthy sight (the museum's, Aleksanderplatz, dozens other), but I had a good time traipsing around in the snow and visiting Christmas markets."
16174 16155 16175
16176 "[i:year:2024]"
16177 "I saw some of the most beautiful sights on earth this year. I'm really fond of moorish architecture & islamic tilework; Granada, Seville, and Córdoba were jaw-dropping places."
16176 16155 16177
16178 "[i:year:2025]"
16179 "A varied year; I saw the old castle in Conwy, Slovenia, a run across Iberia (seeing more moorish architecture), and the rainforests of Anaga in Tenerife."
